name: ASUS H610M-IM-A D5 Industrial Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Supports DDR5-4800 - Intel H610 Chipset - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 3.0 x1 - 1x M.2 Socket - USB 3.2 Gen2 Type-A - 2x Serial Ports - DisplayPort 1.4 - VGA - 2x HDMI 2.1 - 2x Gigabit LAN
shortName: ASUS H610M-IM-A D5 Industrial Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700
description: Industrial Micro-ATX motherboard with LGA 1700 socket, DDR5 support, and multiple display outputs.
